classData.comment:
/**
 * @summary Extracts the live config data from either a ConfigProvider proxy or a plain object.
 *
 * MCP server configs are mutable during tests and after config-file loading, so the shared
 * logger resolves config lazily per write instead of freezing options at module import time.
 *
 * @param {Object} aiConfig
 * @returns {Object}
 */
classData.summary:
Extracts the live config data from either a ConfigProvider proxy or a plain object.

MCP server configs are mutable during tests and after config-file loading, so the shared
logger resolves config lazily per write instead of freezing options at module import time.
classData.name: getConfigData

classData.summary: Resolves the MCP logger config slot with conservative defaults.
classData.name: getLoggerConfig

classData.summary: Serializes arbitrary log arguments without throwing inside the logger.
classData.name: stringifyLogArg

classData.comment:
/**
 * @summary Formats the durable file line for a logger entry.
 * @param {String} level
 * @param {Array} args
 * @param {Object} loggerConfig
 * @returns {String}
 */
classData.summary: Formats the durable file line for a logger entry.
classData.name: formatLogLine

classData.summary: Resolves the effective priority-filtered stderr log level.
classData.name: getConfiguredLogLevel

classData.comment:
/**
 * @summary Creates a protocol-safe MCP logger from a server config object.
 *
 * The shared primitive preserves the existing per-server contracts via each server's
 * `logger` config slot:
 *
 * - workflow servers: priority-filtered stderr only (`stderrMode: "threshold"`)
 * - KB / Memory Core: always-on file sink plus debug-gated stderr
 * - Neural Link: always-on file sink plus tier-gated stderr
 *
 * The logger never writes to stdout. `error()` logs and never throws.
 *
 * @param {Object} aiConfig
 * @param {Object} fallbackLoggerConfig
 * @returns {Object}
 */
classData.summary:
Creates a protocol-safe MCP logger from a server config object.

The shared primitive preserves the existing per-server contracts via each server's
`logger` config slot:

- workflow servers: priority-filtered stderr only (`stderrMode: "threshold"`)
- KB / Memory Core: always-on file sink plus debug-gated stderr
- Neural Link: always-on file sink plus tier-gated stderr

The logger never writes to stdout. `error()` logs and never throws.
classData.name: createLogger

classData.summary: Flushes the active durable log stream before immediate process termination.
classData.name: flush
